_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Tumor sites exhibited decreased labeling with phosphoPKA (pPKA) substrate antibody, indicating decreased PKA activity (Figure 3C,D) and suggestive of decreased levels of cAMP.
resourceName: phosphorylated protein kinase A (pPKA) substrate antibody
